# DPS & Co, Chartered Accountants

> A Chartered Accountancy firm in Mumbai, India, in practice since 2016, offering tax, audit, assurance, and advisory services to businesses and individuals across Mumbai, Thane, and Navi Mumbai.

## Services
- [GST Registration](https://dpsca.in/services/gst-registration/): GST registration and compliance for Mumbai businesses.
- [Income Tax Filing](https://dpsca.in/services/income-tax-filing/): ITR preparation and filing for individuals and businesses.
- [Company Incorporation](https://dpsca.in/services/company-incorporation/): Private limited, LLP and OPC formation.
- [Audit & Assurance](https://dpsca.in/services/audit-assurance/): Statutory, tax and internal audit.
- [Business Advisory](https://dpsca.in/services/business-advisory/): Tax planning, transaction support and CFO services.

## Key pages
- [About & Team](https://dpsca.in/about/)
- [Resources](https://dpsca.in/resources/)
